nodes.speaker: Captain of the Royal Guard
nodes.text: [POLISH PASS] Stand down. I do not want to do this in front of a child.

nodes.speaker: Captain of the Royal Guard
nodes.text: [POLISH PASS] You picked the wrong morning to be brave.

nodes.speaker: Princess
nodes.text: [POLISH PASS] Stop. Stop. Stop it — leave them alone.

nodes.speaker: King Aldren
nodes.text: [POLISH PASS] Take the initiate. The chapel is closed.
